item.title: I gotta update my vaccine chips
item.description: I swear I’m gonna do it soon. I keep putting it off for the newer models that will be out soon. Fuck 5G! I heard the new vaccine chips can mine bitcoins using your blood so you get richer while you sleep. I do have a lot of spare blood in my body thanks to the older vaccines.

item.title: The Sith Awakens: Lord Trump Strikes Back
item.description: Drenched in digital delusions and dressed like a gym-bro Darth Vader, Donald Trump emerges from the political Death Star with a red lightsaber and more spray tan than common sense. Flanked by patriotic poultry and bathed in the glow of galactic grievance, he’s not here to restore balance to the Force — he’s here to bench press the Constitution and Force-push his way back into power. Forget Jedi mind tricks — this is pure Sith thirst.
item.dc:creator: VikingLoveRunestone

item.title: Return of the meme: 1351 (sacrifice a tourist)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, I guess.
Morale is abysmal.
Unemployment rejected my claim, said I get nothing.
Time to file an appeal I guess. Ugh.
There's a long explanation on who Tlacotzin is, but I don't care anymore. Go Google it. I'm sorry.
That reminds me, I need to look up today if the coelocanth report off california was an April fool's joke or a dream.
Phoenician, like all other semetic languages at the time, didn't do vowels with their writing systems.
Me. Always.
Anyway. If I have to get a letter from my speel specialist, I'm in for a problem, as she has retired and moved. I can't say I blame her. Economically, politically, and in just about any other category other than Landscape and "choice of places where Old People go to wait for death," Arizona really sucks right now. I'd leave now if I could afford it. Go to my Godson's family basement, maybe outside of DC.
It is nice to finally know what Deinochirus looked like, after all these years.
The Lazuli Buntings arrived overnight after the rain. I hear them singing. Now I have the stupid musical stuck in my head. The colors are ALMOST the French Tricolor too....
Acrocanthosaurus represent.
The Buntings will come after I'm gone. After the people are gone. What I do doesn't matter. I wish I would die in my sleep. Maybe all of this is a hallucination post 2020 suicide attempt, showing how no matter what I do, everything is always going to suck. My last White-crowned Sparrow friend seems to have left for the North last night, too.
Oh, I hear a Hooded Oriole now, too. They just arrived overnight, too, clearly.
Dreamed I was on vacation in a small mountain town in California goofing around tourist shops until my dad pointed out I hadn't gotten any cool local sodas for my Grandfather and all I was doing was thinking of myself and being selfish and I should be ashamed. So that was fun.
So here I sit with decision paralysis doomscrolling, doomplanning, doombreathing, dooming.
I'll be honest. I wish RFK would just fucking start the autism murder camps already so I could be done with it all. Just a statistic for future historians. I hate that I feel this way, but I'm kinda over "the world" over all. I'm over everything. I'm just done. I'm tired. I'm so tired of getting nowhere.
If anyone has any legitimate remote position leads, please send them my way. Hell, I applied to a gun store this morning, that's how desperate I'm getting.
Finally, a hymn I can nail perfectly.
Stupid Renaissance painters, fucking with our Cherubim. Get a real job, Da Vinci.
And none of these topics are useful for any available career or job shifts.
I guess I'm out of commentary. Whatever.
I love that the Navajo code name for Italy is basically "the land where people don't speak clearly".
As well as colorful birds, so there's something.
This is just me IRL.
It is nice out. If I can motivate my sorry ass, I might try to go to the mountain today.
Would not be surprised if this shows up in Helldivers at some point.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "wake up, glory to Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Koalas can sleep for up to 22 hours a day.
item.description:
SOURCE: https://www.artstation.com/aruurara
A group of parrots is known as a pandemonium.
Baby elephants suck their trunks for comfort.
Axolotl are able to regenerate lost limbs and body organs.
The Giant Pacific Octopus has 3 hearts, 9 brains and blue blood.
Greenland sharks are the longest living vertebrates on earth, with one individual thought to be over 400 years old

item.title: coyotes
item.description:
1..... Coyotes are an important part of the ecosystem and humans have taken away too many wild spaces. Just a reminder that coyotes can scale fences. And not to leave your pets unattended. vid source: siobhancatherine on tt
2..... A coyote and a badger use a culvert as a wildlife crossing to pass under a busy California highway. Coyotes and badgers can be observed hunting together. Badgers will dig for burrowing prey, while the coyote keeps an eye out for escaping prey since they're more suited for chasing them down.
3.....
4.....
5.....
6.....
7.....
8.....
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: The very first video played on MTV.
item.description: MTV, short for Music Television, is an American cable channel that originally launched on August 1, 1981. It was created with the concept of broadcasting music videos hosted by on-air personalities known as “video jockeys” or VJs. Its debut marked a significant shift in how music was consumed, giving artists a new visual platform to promote their work. The first video ever played on MTV was “Video Killed the Radio Star” by The Buggles, a symbolic nod to the changing media landscape. In the 1980s and early 1990s, MTV played a major role in shaping pop culture, influencing fashion, language, and trends among young audiences.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: We have the theater to ourselves.
item.description: Update: We had a great time and laughed a lot :) After the movie, we sat in the car for a bit chatting about Minecraft updates and lore. Update part two: He just asked me to update Minecraft so we can play when he gets home from work.
